mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_SOCIAL_MEMBER ( ID, SOCIAL_MEMBER_PROVIDER_ID, SOCIAL_MEMBER_PROVIDER, MEMBER_ID, SOCIAL_ACCESS_TOKEN, SOCIAL_REFRESH_TOKEN ) VALUES ( SEQ_SOCIAL_MEMBER.NEXTVAL, #{socialMemberProviderId}, #{socialMemberProvider}, #{memberId}, #{socialAccessToken}, #{socialRefreshToken} )
mapper.select: SELECT ID, SOCIAL_MEMBER_PROVIDER_ID AS socialMemberProviderId, SOCIAL_MEMBER_PROVIDER AS socialMemberProvider, MEMBER_ID AS memberId, SOCIAL_ACCESS_TOKEN AS socialAccessToken, SOCIAL_REFRESH_TOKEN AS socialRefreshToken FROM TBL_SOCIAL_MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_SOCIAL_MEMBER SET SOCIAL_MEMBER_PROVIDER_ID = SOCIAL_MEMBER_PROVIDER_ID || '_withdrawn_' || MEMBER_ID, SOCIAL_ACCESS_TOKEN = NULL, SOCIAL_REFRESH_TOKEN = NULL WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}
